---
title: "Settlement Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial patterns, morphology, and evolution of rural and urban settlements."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

Welcome to the **Settlement Geography** module.

---

## Rural Settlements

{{< include human-geography/04-rural-settlements.md >}}

---

## Urban Settlements

{{< include human-geography/05-urban-settlements.md >}}
{{< include human-geography/07-urban-morphology.md >}}
{{< include urban-geography/01-concepts-of-urban-geography.md >}}
{{< include urban-geography/02-classification-of-towns.md >}}
{{< include urban-geography/03-urban-morphology-models.md >}}
{{< include urban-geography/04-central-place-theory.md >}}
{{< include urban-geography/05-urban-fringe-and-slums.md >}}
{{< include urban-geography/06-trends-of-urbanization.md >}}
{{< include urban-geography/07-rank-size-and-primate-city.md >}}

---

## Theoretical Frameworks

{{< include human-geography/08-central-place-theory.md >}}


---

## Quick Reference

{{< include settlement-geography/31-quick-reference.md >}}

---
